request_text: Backfill the missing CHANGELOG entries for the coord-authority trio degod (#2464, #2465, #2508) which landed on main as ed336e034 + 00d4a4f5b with no CHANGELOG line. Add a Changed 'Internal:' entry for the behaviour-preserving decomposition (workflow.py->workflow_cores+workflow_executor, implement.py->implement_cores with GitPort injected + two noqa:C901 removed, acceptance/->summary_core+gates_core; Typer shell + pure cores + executor pattern following #2494/#2308), and a Fixed entry for the sole behaviour delta #2508 (coord-authority identity-meta read off the coordination husk misfired safe_commit; now anchored on the primary checkout, red-first regression pinned). Match the CHANGELOG's bold-lead-in + issue-ref + backticked-identifier convention.
